title: endotropis roylei
intro: Endotropis roylei, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant's extracts are used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health issues. Further research is needed to fully understand the extent of its medicinal properties and health benefits, but it has shown promise in traditional and modern medicine.
